item.name: Draught Chocobo Whistle
item.description: A small hand-carved whistle that emits a unique, high-pitched tone discernible only by a draught chocobo trained from birth to recognize and respond to the sound. Use to summon your personal draught chocobo.

mount.name: Draught Chocobo
mount.action: Summon forth your draught chocobo, a massive bird large and strong enough to bear two riders.
mount.description: This heretofore unseen breed of chocobo was said to have been discovered by chocobo hunters searching for the legendary Chocobo Forest. Its enormous size would make it a fine pack chocobo, but its foul temper prevents it from completing even the simplest of tasks without the injury of some poor rider.
mount.tooltip:
The thing was thrice my
size and had already
maimed several keeps.
- Battlewarden Ribald
